content.problemStatement:
You are given three inputs:


An integer **R** — the number of rows of the rectangle
An integer **C** — the number of columns of the rectangle
A character **ch** — the character to be used for drawing the rectangle
Your task is to print a **filled rectangle** of size **R × C** using the character ch.


Input Format
The first line contains an integer **T** — the number of test cases.

For each test case:


The first line contains two integers **R** and **C**.


The second line contains a single character **ch**.



Output Format
For each test case, print the rectangle pattern made up of character **ch**.

Each row should contain **C** characters, and there should be **R** rows.


Print a blank line **after each test case**.
